description_long: This is a vintage hardcover book with a dark brown cover, featuring reinforced leather corners and spine. The spine is ornately decorated with gold embossing and floral patterns, giving it an antique appearance. The book's edges show signs of wear, with the leather slightly scuffed and the corners rounded from use. The front and back covers are plain, lacking any visible illustration or artwork. The spine contains the only visible text, which is gold-stamped and stands out against the darker leather. The book appears to be of medium thickness and size, typical of classic literature volumes.
description: A vintage hardcover book with a dark brown cover, ornate gold-embossed leather spine, and plain covers.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing a plain, dark brown surface with leather corners and no illustration.
description_view_1: The spine is shown, featuring ornate gold embossing, floral patterns, and visible title text.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, similar to the front, with plain dark brown material and leather corners.
description_view_3: The book's fore-edge is visible, displaying a marbled pattern typical of antique books.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark brown leather with ornate gold embossing, including floral patterns and horizontal bands. The title is gold-stamped in a classic serif font, oriented vertically.
